home.hero.title: Sayele Message
home.hero.subtitle: Multi-Channel Messaging Platform
home.hero.description: Powerful messaging API for businesses. Send SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Facebook Messenger messages at scale with advanced analytics and multi-provider support.
home.features.multiChannel.title: Multi-Channel Messaging
home.features.multiChannel.description: Send messages via SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Facebook Messenger from one platform.
home.features.analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
home.features.analytics.description: Track delivery rates, message volume, and performance metrics across all channels in real-time.
home.features.multiProvider.title: Multi-Provider Support
home.features.multiProvider.description: Connect with multiple providers including Twilio, Vonage, MTarget, and more for maximum reliability.
home.features.fast.title: Lightning Fast
home.features.fast.description: High-speed message delivery across multiple carriers worldwide.
home.features.secure.title: Secure & Reliable
home.features.secure.description: Enterprise-grade security with webhook callbacks and automatic failover.
home.features.bulk.title: Bulk Messaging
home.features.bulk.description: Send thousands of messages across all channels with campaign management and scheduling.
home.features.contacts.title: Contact Management
home.features.contacts.description: Organize contacts into groups and manage conversations across all channels in one place.
home.features.templates.title: Templates & Automation
home.features.templates.description: Save time with message templates, AI assistance, and real-time delivery notifications.
